landing.hero_subtitle: Match resumes to job descriptions instantly with advanced AI scoring, ATS optimization, and actionable insights.
landing.trusted_by: Trusted by recruiters and job seekers worldwide
landing.features_subtitle: Everything you need to optimize your hiring process
landing.feature_ai_desc: Advanced semantic analysis matches CVs against job descriptions with pinpoint accuracy.
landing.feature_ats_desc: Ensure your resume passes Applicant Tracking Systems with smart formatting suggestions.
landing.feature_skills_desc: Identify missing skills and get actionable recommendations to improve your profile.
landing.feature_multi_desc: Upload CVs in any language. Our AI adapts to your content automatically.
landing.feature_history_desc: Track all your past analyses, compare scores, and monitor improvements over time.
landing.feature_recruiter_desc: Manage candidates, rank top applicants, and streamline your recruitment pipeline.
landing.how_subtitle: Get your CV score in three simple steps
landing.how_step1_desc: Drag & drop your PDF resume or click to browse files.
landing.how_step2_desc: Paste the job posting you're targeting for an accurate match.
landing.how_step3_desc: Receive an instant score with detailed skill breakdown and recommendations.
landing.demo_subtitle: Here's what a real analysis looks like
landing.pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs
landing.faq1_a: Currently we support PDF format. Upload your CV as a PDF for the best results.
landing.faq2_q: How accurate is the AI scoring?
landing.faq2_a: Our AI uses semantic analysis, keyword matching, and industry-specific models to deliver highly accurate match scores.
landing.faq3_a: Yes. Your files are processed securely and never stored permanently. We use enterprise-grade encryption.
landing.faq4_q: Can I use it for free?
landing.faq4_a: Yes! Our Free plan includes 3 analyses per day. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.
landing.faq5_q: Does it work with any language CV?
landing.faq5_a: Yes. Our AI supports CVs written in English, Turkish, and many other languages.
landing.footer_description: AI-powered resume analysis platform helping job seekers and recruiters make better decisions.

auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link
auth.check_email: Check your email for the confirmation link!
auth.reset_sent: Password reset link sent! Check your email.

dashboard.no_analyses_desc: Upload a CV to get started with your first analysis.
dashboard.daily_limit_desc: You've used all your free analyses for today. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.

analyze.upload_desc: Drag & drop your PDF here or click to browse
analyze.job_desc_placeholder:

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in Python, FastAPI, and cloud services...

history.no_history_desc: Your completed analyses will appear here.

history.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all history?
